summary: Synthetic reviewer-contract fixture with generic evidence labels, stable finding keys, and caller-owned action boundaries.

findings.title: Evidence label needs clearer support
findings.summary: The synthetic packet asks the reviewer to check whether a claim is supported, but the shared fixture uses only generic evidence labels instead of real source names or source paths.
findings.recommendation: Ask the caller-owned workflow to provide a sanitized evidence summary before treating the claim as reviewable.

findings.title: External-action readiness is unsupported
findings.summary: The synthetic packet includes an external-action readiness claim, but the shared fixture includes no approval, release, or routing evidence and cannot authorize a real-world step.
findings.recommendation: Keep approval, routing, remediation, and publication gates in the caller-owned workflow until sanitized action evidence is supplied.

decision.summary: The fixture is safe to keep as a reviewer-contract example, but it still needs clearer evidence support and caller-owned follow-up handling.

non_blocking_findings.title: Evidence label needs clearer support
non_blocking_findings.summary: The synthetic packet asks the reviewer to check whether a claim is supported, but the shared fixture uses only generic evidence labels instead of real source names or source paths.
non_blocking_findings.recommendation: Ask the caller-owned workflow to provide a sanitized evidence summary before treating the claim as reviewable.

follow_up: Keep approval, routing, remediation, and publication gates in the caller-owned workflow.

provenance.label: Privacy boundary
provenance.value: No real source paths, tracker identifiers, account data, or domain policy

markdown:
# Summary
Synthetic reviewer-contract fixture with generic evidence labels and stable finding keys only.

## Findings
- Medium: Evidence label needs clearer support.
- Medium: External-action readiness is unsupported.

## Boundary
No target selection, private naming, policy thresholds, routing, or domain interpretation is part of this fixture.
